subject.description: Two marketing team members in realistic, everyday office wear.
subject.action: One person is rubbing their temples with both hands in pure frustration. The other is pointing at a laptop screen, showing how an AI tool quietly cost more time than it saved.

setting.location: A chaotic, realistic office desk filled with coffee cups and sticky notes.

composition.framing: Rule of thirds. MUST follow cropping rules: leave headspace above both figures, never cut in flesh, full upper bodies visible.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Medium depth of field, keeping both subjects in focus while the messy desk adds context.

lighting.type: Standard fluorescent office lighting combined with natural window light.
lighting.color_grading: Unedited, documentary-style, zero cinematic grading, raw.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear: cinematic lighting, polished aesthetics, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, cut off head, cut flesh, over-the-top acting.
